global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo at the top, a central message, and a call to action at the bottom.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple signup process for a card service.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'VaultRun' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Graphic element
elements.description: An abstract graphic element that appears to be a circular shape overlapping a rectangular shape, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold, black text stating 'Secure & simple' followed by smaller text 'Fast signup, instant card', centrally positioned.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Start now' in white on a dark background.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge at the bottom left corner displaying '-30%' in a contrasting color to attract attention.
